title: CXTAI White Shower Curtain, Mould Proof and Mildew Resistant Washable Polyester Bathroom Curtains w/12pcs Hooks (71x71inch,180x180cm)
features: Size: 180cm x 180cm / 71"W x 71"L. Notice: we provide 12x plastic hooks(white color).
Mildew resistant, anti-bacterial, washable. Before using, immerse the curtain in lukewarm water to remove the creases.
Weighted bottom hem and sewn sides, rustproof metal grommets.
Package included: 1x shower curtain, a set of 12x plastic hooks.
description: Product Description CXTAI Black Shower Curtain CXTAI White Shower Curtain Weighted bottom hem and sewn sides, rustproof metal grommets. 12 pieces heavy duty plastic hooks. While it is water-resistant, some water may still pass through. Size: W 71" x L 71" or W 71" x L 79" Customer Shared Pictures What material is the shower curtain made of and what is its thickness? Our shower curtain is crafted from high-quality Polyester—significantly different from the PEVA material. It is made of material with a weight of 110g per square meter, which places it in the medium to premium range among similar products. Is this shower curtain water-resistant or waterproof? This shower curtain is designed to be water-resistant. However, it is not fully waterproof; under intense water flow or direct splashes, water may seep through. If you’re seeking a completely waterproof option, this product may not be suitable. Does the shower curtain offer mould-proof and mildew-resistant properties? Yes, it comes with a mould-proof coating that provides a degree of mildew resistance. Please note that in persistently dark and humid conditions, some mould formation may still occur, as observed by a few customers. How should I clean this shower curtain? The shower curtain is machine washable, ensuring easy and convenient care.
